title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the future of entertainment and media.

questions.question: Do you think traditional media such as newspapers and television will survive in the age of the internet?
Is the huge amount of entertainment content available online a positive thing, or does it cause problems?

script.text: Some people worry that streaming services and social media are making people less likely to engage with challenging or serious content. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
